messages.content:
`key`_: Performs key down presses on the arguments passed in order, then performs key releases in reverse order._
`key_down`: Performs key down presses on the passed argument, without releasing.
`key_up`: Performs key releases.
如何按照第一个介绍的风格和语气，介绍 key_down和key_up两个函数

`key_down`_: Performs a key down press on the argument passed in, without releasing it._

`key_up`_: Performs a key release on the argument passed in._

`open_url`_:_ `go_forward`: `go_backward`_:_ `wait`: Wait specified seconds for the change to happen. * `call_user`:
介绍这几个动作，并且强调，open_url，go forward，go backward只有在web页面上有用。call_user是让用户来介入

`open_url`_: Opens the specified URL in the browser. **Only applicable on web pages.**

`go_forward`_: Navigates forward to the next page in the browser history. **Only applicable on web pages.**

`go_backward`_: Navigates back to the previous page in the browser history. **Only applicable on web pages.**

`wait`_: Waits the specified number of seconds for a change to happen.

`call_user`_: Requests the user to intervene and take over (e.g., to complete a step that requires human input) before continuing.

For each function call, return a json object with function name and arguments within <tool_call></tool_call> XML tags: <tool_call> {"name": <function-name>, "arguments": <args-json-object>} </tool_call>  If you need to call more than one function, return more <tool_call></tool_call> XML tags with remain a single json object with function name and arguments within them: <tool_call> {"name": <function-name>, "arguments": <args-json-object>} </tool_call> <tool_call> {"name": <function-name>, "arguments": <args-json-object>} </tool_call>
  
模仿前半段，润色一下后半段调用多个函数的指令

If you need to call more than one function, return multiple `<tool_call></tool_call>` XML tags, one call per tag. Each tag must contain a single JSON object with the function name and its arguments, for example:

<tool_call>{"name": <function-name>, "arguments": <args-json-object>}</tool_call>  
<tool_call>{"name": <function-name>, "arguments": <args-json-object>}</tool_call>
